message:
fix(pager): monotonic fetch_max for db_size and visible_commit_seq in publish

Under group commit, Transaction A (db_size=5) publishing after Transaction B
(db_size=7) would REVERT the published db_size from 7 back to 5. This caused
BusySnapshot errors where subsequent transactions couldn't see pages 6-7.

The fix replaces .store() with .fetch_max() for both db_size and
visible_commit_seq in finalize_publish(), ensuring these values are
monotonically non-decreasing regardless of publish order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
